title: A New Peace Plan
article_text: The federal government wants to reveal a new plan for peace. The plan shows a big percentage of people favor peace over crime. The status of the crime rate is in decline after a decade. The government will launch a new program to warn consumers about crime. A famous institution will partner with the government on this plan. They will examine the problem carefully and spot the main issues. The plan also includes a program to help dry areas get water. Eventually, the heat from the sun will help grow food for horses. This news excites many people because it gives them hope. Nobody wants to see the speed of peace slow down.

image_prompts: A government building with a sign 'Federal Government' and a person holding a paper titled 'Peace Plan'.
A pie chart showing a large percentage (80%) for peace and a small percentage (20%) for crime.
A graph showing a line going down over a decade, with the word 'decline' and 'crime rate'.
A person launching a rocket with a 'New Program' label, and a consumer listening to a warning.
Two people shaking hands, one from a famous institution and one from the government.
A person examining a map with a magnifying glass and spotting a red mark on a problem area.
A dry desert with cracked ground and a water pipe bringing water to the area.
The sun shining with heat rays, and a horse eating grass near a farm.
A group of happy people cheering, with the word 'excite' above them.
A clock showing fast speed and a dove symbolizing peace, with a person saying 'Nobody wants slow peace'.
